meta.title: Clear Aligners Treatment | Prudentia Micro Dental Care
meta.description: Discreet and comfortable teeth straightening with clear aligners in Pimple Saudagar

hero.paragraph: At Prudentia Micro Dental Care, we do dentistry differently with revolutionary Dental Operating Microscope (DOM) technology bringing 30x magnification to your care.

microConsultation.title: What Is a
microConsultation.subtitle: A modern dental examination powered by microscope technology to uncover issues invisible to the naked eye.

philosophyBox.title: "See More, Treat Less" Philosophy
items: Early diagnosis of micro-fractures and decay
Live video feeds for better understanding

whyMattersBox.title: Why Microscopy Matters
whyMattersBox.paragraph: Dr. Bhushan uses high-powered magnification to detect early-stage tooth decay, micro-fractures, or subtle gum disease that conventional exams might miss.

items.title: Early Detection
items.description: Spot problems before they become painful or require extensive treatment

items.title: Informed Decisions
items.description: See what we see and understand your treatment options

items.title: Precision Treatment
items.description: Target only the affected areas, preserving healthy tooth structure

whyChoose.title: Why Choose
whyChoose.paragraph: Here's what sets microscope-assisted dental care apart from conventional methods:

advancedCleaning.title: Advanced Dental Cleaning with a
advancedCleaning.subtitle: Even routine procedures benefit from our microscope-enhanced approach

items.label: Ultrasonic Scalers
items.text: Break up tartar with gentle vibrations

items.label: Air Polishers
items.text: Remove plaque and stains with fine powder mist

items.label: Desensitizing Rinse
items.text: Strengthens enamel and protects against decay

longTermBox.title: Long-Term Benefits
longTermBox.paragraph: By smoothing tooth surfaces under magnification, we help prevent plaque from reattaching, making it easier to maintain your oral health between visits.

healthConnection.paragraph1: The mouth is often the first place systemic diseases show early signs. During a Micro-Consultation, Dr. Bhushan may detect symptoms that indicate broader health issues, well before they become serious.
healthConnection.paragraph2: This makes micro-dentistry not just about your teeth, but your total well-being.

cta.title: Discover the Power of
cta.paragraph: Join the growing number of patients choosing minimally invasive, high-precision care. Experience dentistry that's gentler, smarter, and truly personalized.

benefits.title: 30x Magnification

benefits.description: Spot cavities and cracks before symptoms appear

benefits.title: Faster Healing
benefits.description: Precise treatments mean less trauma and quicker recovery
